subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Taqi! There exist certain pressing expenditures, among which is the maintenance of your companion and others [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا سید تقی بعضی از مصارف مبرمه موجود از جمله معاش رفیق شما و سائرین
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
